title: Bumpy wave road + strange noises
prompt: Wide exterior tracking shot from outside the LEFT side of the @jeep-interior view — actually a side-on cinematic angle of the Jeep rolling along a sandy bumpy track in @magic-forest-sandy. The camera follows the Jeep from outside as it visibly ROCKS side-to-side over wave-like sandy ruts. Through the open windows three faces are clearly visible from the side: @Mama in the driver seat (LEFT) BOTH HANDS on the steering wheel, head facing FORWARD looking at the road ahead through the windshield, big delighted laugh — Mama is NEVER turned backward, ALWAYS facing forward. Behind Mama in the rear-left seat: @Eva curly blonde with rainbow bow, hand cupped to her ear, eyes huge, leaning toward the side window. Behind the empty front passenger seat in the rear-right: @Sara brown ponytail, gripping her seatbelt, hair bouncing. The Jeep tilts side-to-side as it rolls over big sandy bumps. Eva (wide-eyed, hand at ear): "...did you HEAR that?!" Sara: "It sounded like... GIGGLES!" Mama (eyes on the road ahead, smiling huge): "Hold on tight! The road is WAVY!"
